channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pole 4 signal head is covered with foliage, local council need to be informed., 9th May
item.description:
Pole 4 signal head is covered with foliage, local council need to be informed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 189, Old Brompton Road, South Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 38 Chesterfield Grove-Flytipping, 9th May
item.description:
Items blocking the pavement. It needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grove Vale (next to Pret a Manger)-Trolley, 9th May
item.description:
Shopping Trolley flytipped, the Trolley is blocking pavement and can also go into the busy road. It needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-15, Vale End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 16 Melbourne Grove-Waste Overflowing, 9th May
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied due to overflowing waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tell Grove-Waste overflowing, 9th May
item.description:
The bin at Tell Grove needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Tell Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This bin is never emptied, 9th May
item.description:
This is never emptied and people then leave around the base as it is jam packed or dump thier rubbish on the grass area. I live right next to this area. It is disgusting and embarrassing for people visiting.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandbach Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees growing out into path. Another plant looks like brambles but not with sticky leaves onto path, 9th May
item.description:
Trees need thinning back, close to street light,makes the path narrow. There are also a different plant, looks like brambles but not, has sticky leaves which is expanding across the path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 42 A Charlotte Street W1, 8th May
item.description:
The light has stopped working. Can it be fixed please? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Goodge Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 8th May
item.description:
Graffiti on the side wall by Calvert Rd and Vanbrugh Hill - it’s been there for a while and needs cleaning off

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Calvert Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White substance dumped by tree, 8th May
item.description:
Not sure what it is but seems poisonous to mice at least

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 1 Hampshire street, 8th May
item.description:
Telegraph pole outside 1 Hampshire street is located in a very awkward place right in the middle of the pavement . It’s only connecting 2 buildings overhead : 23-25 hampshire street and 5 Hampshire street. Openreach dug the street a bunch of times in the last couple of years and I believe all buildings are now connected underground so hopefully the pole is no longer required and you can remove the street clutter if you confirm it’s redundant
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hampshire Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lightbulb burnt and needs to be replaced, 8th May
item.description:
This specific light bulb for the lamp Post is burnt and needs to be replaced
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2C,2D, Star Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car?, 8th May
item.description:
I took a picture of this car and posted it on Facebook to see if somebody knew about this car, but the car has been there for at least a month or two. I believe somebody checked and it is taxed and has an MOT but it is over the parking spot line and has been there for awhile as there is mould around the tires on the floor and it looks like it’s been untouched so it could be stolen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cavendish Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Been there for some time, very distressing for school children and general public to walk past.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arbuthnot Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag on pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture, 8th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darwin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ring barked trees., 8th May
item.description:
A Id verde contractor today ring barked several trees on Belmont Lane with a strimmer. Unless the council policy has changed, a protective ring of growth is supposed to be left around the trees to prevent damage. Ring barking weakens the tree, leading to disease and loss of tree. Please can contractors be reminded about this please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 8th May
item.description:
Fox hit by car in middle of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Southlands Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green telecoms box, 8th May
item.description:
Graffiti that needs removing please. End of Monastery Gardens, junction with Parsonage Lane near the postbox.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parsonage Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground
